name: Ruby
description: The King of Gemstones, Ruby radiates the solar energy of power and vitality. It bestows authority, clears self-doubt, and opens doors to fame and leadership positions.
purification: Dip in raw milk for 1 hour, rinse with Gangajal, chant mantra 108 times.
precautions: Avoid wearing if Sun is malefic in your chart. Consult an astrologer before wearing.

name: Pearl
description: The Moon's stone, Pearl soothes the emotional body and brings deep tranquility. It enhances intuition, promotes motherly qualities, and attracts consistent prosperity.
purification: Soak in raw milk overnight, rinse with clean water, chant mantra 108 times.
precautions: Avoid synthetic Pearls. Only use natural sea or freshwater Pearls for astrological purposes.

name: Red Coral
description: Mars's fiery stone gives immense courage and vitality. It helps overcome debt, enemies, and blood-related ailments, and is excellent for property acquisition.
purification: Wash with Gangajal, place before a Ganesha idol for a day, chant mantra 108 times.
precautions: Avoid if Mars is in a beneficial house. People with high BP should use cautiously.

name: Emerald
description: Mercury's radiant gem enhances the intellect, memory, and eloquence. It is the stone of merchants, writers, and students — greatly accelerating learning and commercial success.
purification: Dip in honey for 1 hour, rinse with milk, chant mantra 108 times.
precautions: Avoid if Mercury is retrograde during the wearing ceremony. Do not combine with Pearl.

name: Yellow Sapphire
description: The most auspicious of all stones, Yellow Sapphire attracts abundance, ensures marital happiness, and imparts deep philosophical wisdom under Jupiter's blessings.
purification: Soak in a mix of turmeric and milk for 30 minutes, rinse, chant mantra 108 times.
precautions: Wear only if Jupiter is in a good position in your birth chart.

name: Diamond
description: Venus's supreme gem amplifies charisma, attracts romantic love, and brings material luxury. Ideal for artists, creatives, and anyone seeking glamour and longevity.
purification: Wash with rose water and raw milk, chant mantra 108 times before wearing on Friday morning.
precautions: Test for 3 days before permanent wearing. Extremely powerful — can backfire if Venus is afflicted.

name: Blue Sapphire
description: The fastest-acting and most powerful of all stones. Blue Sapphire can bring overnight success but must be tested for 3 days before committing. It bestows supreme discipline.
purification: Soak in iron vessel with water for 2 hours, rinse with Gangajal, chant mantra 108 times.
precautions: MUST be tested for 3 days before wearing permanently. Wear for a trial period first.

name: Hessonite
description: Ruled by Rahu, Hessonite brings sudden breakthroughs and protects against psychological fears and hidden enemies. Great for tech, politics, and unconventional fields.
purification: Wash with Gangajal and leave under moonlight overnight, chant mantra 108 times.
precautions: Wear only during a Rahu Mahadasha or Antardasha period, as advised by a Vedic astrologer.

name: Cat's Eye
description: Ketu's mystical stone detaches one from worldly illusions and sparks intense spiritual awareness. It shields against black magic and grants extraordinary intuition.
purification: Soak in raw milk with Gangajal for 2 hours, chant mantra 108 times before wearing.
precautions: Extremely powerful. Test for 3 days. Not suitable for everyone — consult an astrologer.
